# ViLexNorm filtering report

Trang thai: placeholder cho bao cao sau khi chay `filter_vilexnorm_candidates.py`.

## Can bao cao

| Nhom | So mau |
|:--|--:|
| Raw | TBD |
| Processed all | TBD |

| Hard negative candidates | TBD |
| Rejected | TBD |

## Ly do reject can thong ke

- Qua ngan/qua dai.
- Trung lap sau chuan hoa.
- URL/so dien thoai/CTA molog.
- Quang cao/tuyen dung/kiem tien/vay tien/co bac.
- Noi dung nhay cam/tuc qua manh.
- Khong xac dinh duoc intent benign.
